svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="RfgLcpEEf8OsZKxj4jRx"> <mxGraphModel dx="961" dy="554" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title Requirements Diagram - Communication Loss in Truck Platoon

top to bottom direction

skinparam rectangle {
 BackgroundColor White
 BorderColor Black
}
skinparam nodesep 20
skinparam ranksep 25

rectangle \"«requirement»\nREQ-1\nCommunication Loss Handling\n\nThe platoon shall safely handle communication loss\nbetween the lead truck and a following truck.\" as R1

rectangle \"«requirement»\nREQ-1.1\nLead Truck Data\n\nA following truck shall receive speed,\nbraking and distance information\nfrom the lead truck.\" as R11

rectangle \"«requirement»\nREQ-1.2\nLoss Detection\n\nA following truck shall detect when\nmessages from the lead truck are missing.\" as R12

rectangle \"«requirement»\nREQ-1.3\nSafe Mode\n\nThe affected following truck shall\nswitch to safe driving mode.\" as R13

rectangle \"«requirement»\nREQ-1.4\nSafe Distance\n\nThe affected following truck shall\nincrease its distance from the truck in front.\" as R14

rectangle \"«requirement»\nREQ-1.5\nRecovery\n\nThe affected following truck shall reconnect\nor leave the platoon safely.\" as R15

R1 <-- R11 : «contain»
R1 <-- R12 : «contain»
R1 <-- R13 : «contain»
R1 <-- R14 : «contain»
R1 <-- R15 : «contain»

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="jwzEsFjfNS6DFtfDwgvs-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="324" width="1615" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
